decision_table.main_uncertainty: Only the first P04 nonlinear Gaussian seed was run because the frozen zero-exceedance gate failed immediately; this identifies a quality-gate failure for the locked candidate, not a broad statistical ranking.
decision_table.next_justified_action: Review and execute a bounded P04A range-bearing failure diagnostic before deciding whether to stop as repair-required or open a new candidate-freeze lane.
decision_table.not_concluded: No default promotion, no posterior correctness, no statistical superiority, no HMC readiness, and no broad nonlinear validity.
decision_table.primary_criterion_status: FAIL: seed 84000 exceeded the frozen normalized log-likelihood delta threshold.
decision_table.veto_diagnostic_status: PASS for deterministic route validity: both routes produced finite GPU/TF32 outputs and passed residual, log-weight, ESS, and metadata checks.

inference_status.hard_veto_screen: PASS for deterministic validity, FAIL for P04 paired quality threshold
inference_status.descriptive_only_differences: Runtime, factor/core diagnostics, and the magnitude of the one failed seed's delta are descriptive diagnostics.
inference_status.next_evidence_needed: P04A reproducibility/tuning diagnostic or owner decision to stop as repair-required.

nonclaims: P04 range-bearing nonlinear Gaussian quality gate failed for the locked candidate
